The final move in the sequence is **h8h3**, followed by **d3d4**, **h3b3**, **d4c5**, **b3c3**, **c5b5**, **g4f6**, **b5a6**, **c3b4**, **a6a7**, **f6d7**, **a7a6**, and **b4b6**, which leaves Black with no legal moves (checkmate on the a7 pawn). Thus, the game ends with **Black in checkmate**.

\boxed{B}
